description: Google Cloud Organization Policy lets administrators define and manage policy constraints across organizations, folders, and projects in Google Cloud. It is used to control allowed configurations and governance rules for cloud resources.
summary: orgpolicy.googleapis.com exposes the Organization Policy HTTP API plus an MCP endpoint at `https://orgpolicy.googleapis.com/mcp`; the MCP endpoint is publicly reachable, while HTTP API auth could not be confirmed from the pages read.
